reason: Significant selling pressure from large holders (Bitdeer liquidating all Bitcoin, Vitalik Buterin accelerating Ether sales) combined with increased regulatory scrutiny (Kucoin halting EU business due to compliance issues) and potential supply overhang (high Bitcoin balances on Binance) points to a market facing strong headwinds. Immediate upside is capped, while downside risk is elevated. Upcoming earnings reports from Circle and miners add further event risk.
headlines: Kucoin told to halt new EU business due to compliance staffing shortfalls
Bitcoin balances on Binance hit highest since November 2024: here's what it means
Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin accelerates ether sales
Bitdeer sold all its bitcoin to fund its move into AI data centers
Circle Internet, crypto miners report earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
